message:
fix(sling): defer polecat session start to prevent race condition

SpawnPolecatForSling now defers tmux session creation, returning a
SpawnedPolecatInfo with an empty Pane. The caller (sling) sets up
the molecule/bead attachment first, then calls StartSession(). This
ensures the polecat sees its hooked work when gt prime runs on
session start.

Previously, the polecat session started immediately, and gt prime
would run before the molecule was attached — causing the polecat to
miss its assigned work.

Based on PR #952 by PiotrTrzpil.

Co-Authored-By: PiotrTrzpil <PiotrTrzpil@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
